title: aspidium marginiferum
intro: Aspidium marginiferum, also known as the Rigid Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to eastern Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Aspidium marginiferum is typically used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties and make it more palatable.
